
``` {=html}
<div class="ons-container">
  <div class="ons-grid">

    <div class="ons-grid__col ons-col-4@m">
      <div class="ons-card">
        <a href="https://github.com/ONSvisual/Charts" class="ons-card__link">
          <img class="ons-card__image ons-u-mb-s " height="100" width="303"
            src="images/resources_thumbnails/charts.png" alt="" loading="lazy" />
          <h2 class="ons-card__title ons-u-fs-m" id="card-with-image-1"> Charts</h2>
        </a>
        <p id="text1" class="ons-card__body">A small blurb about charts - link is to charts repo.</p>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="ons-grid__col ons-col-4@m">
      <div class="ons-card">
        <a href="https://github.com/ONSdigital/maptemplates" class="ons-card__link">
          <img class="ons-card__image ons-u-mb-s " height="100" width="303"
            src="images/resources_thumbnails/maps.png" alt="" loading="lazy" />
          <h2 class="ons-card__title ons-u-fs-m" id="card-with-image-2"> Map templates </h2>
        </a>
        <p id="text2" class="ons-card__body">Blurb about map templates.</p>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="ons-grid__col ons-col-4@m">
      <div class="ons-card">
        <a href="https://gitlab-app-l-01/ONSvisual" class="ons-card__link">
          <img class="ons-card__image ons-u-mb-s " height="100" width="303"
            src="images/resources_thumbnails/onsvisual.png" alt="" loading="lazy" />
          <h2 class="ons-card__title ons-u-fs-m" id="card-with-image-3"> ONSvisual </h2>
        </a>
        <p id="text3" class="ons-card__body">Some blurb about ONSvisual
        </p>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="ons-grid__col ons-col-4@m">
      <div class="ons-card">
        <a href="https://service-manual.ons.gov.uk/data-visualisation" class="ons-card__link">
          <img class="ons-card__image ons-u-mb-s " height="100" width="303"
            src="images/resources_thumbnails/servicemanual.png" alt="" loading="lazy" />
          <h2 class="ons-card__title ons-u-fs-m" id="card-with-image-1"> Service manual </h2>
        </a>
        <p id="text1" class="ons-card__body">A bit of blurb about the service manual</p>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="ons-grid__col ons-col-4@m">
      <div class="ons-card">
        <a href="https://www.ons.gov.uk/explore-local-statistics/" class="ons-card__link">
          <img class="ons-card__image ons-u-mb-s " height="100" width="303"
            src="images/resources_thumbnails/els.png" alt="" loading="lazy" />
          <h2 class="ons-card__title ons-u-fs-m" id="card-with-image-2"> Explore Local Statistics </h2>
        </a>
        <p id="text2" class="ons-card__body">A bit of blurb about the Explore Local Statistics service.</p>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="ons-grid__col ons-col-4@m">
      <div class="ons-card">
        <a href="https://onsdigital.github.io/uk-topojson/" class="ons-card__link">
          <img class="ons-card__image ons-u-mb-s " height="100" width="303"
            src="images/resources_thumbnails/geogs.png" alt="" loading="lazy" />
          <h2 class="ons-card__title ons-u-fs-m" id="card-with-image-3"> UK Administrative Geographies </h2>
        </a>
        <p id="text3" class="ons-card__body">Subtitle about tool for downloading UK geographies 2014–2025
        </p>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

```
